BY THIS ORDER, THE COURT DOES NOT RULE UPON ANY OBJECTIONS TO ANY CATEGORY OF DOCUMENTS THAT MAY BE MADE AT THE DEPOSITION. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT ST. PETER'S HOUSING COMMITTEE'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 425.16 IS DENIED. MS. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAREN Y. UCHIYAMA, TEL. NO. 563-9301, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WORSTOFSF.ORG'S MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED.
